title: Xtra Tender German Pork Skewers
description: A fatty and tender German dish featuring gherkin relish and tadka, perfect for crowds, this recipe is a shojin-friendly adaptation of traditional German cuisine, combining the flavors of pork, gherkin relish, and tadka in a unique and delicious way.
instructions: Preheat the grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together tadka oil, gherkin relish, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the pork cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated pork cubes, onion pieces, and garlic onto the soaked wooden skewers.
Grill the skewers for 15 minutes, turning occasionally, until the pork is cooked through.
Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with additional gherkin relish if desired.
